mnemonics.title: Six Phases of Compiler
mnemonics.content: Lazy Students Seldom Invest In Coding - Lexical analysis, Syntax analysis, Semantic analysis, Intermediate code generation, code optImization, Code generation

mnemonics.title: Analysis-Synthesis Model
mnemonics.content: Analysis = Front End (LSS - Lexical, Syntax, Semantic). Synthesis = Back End (IOC - Intermediate code, Optimization, Code generation).

mnemonics.title: Token Components
mnemonics.content: TLP - Token name, Lexeme (actual string), Pattern (rule describing form). Example: for 'sum', token=identifier, lexeme='sum', pattern=letter followed by letters/digits.

mnemonics.title: Types of Compilers
mnemonics.content: SMCJ - Single-pass, Multi-pass, Cross compiler, JIT compiler. Single is fast but limited; Multi allows better optimization; Cross targets different platforms; JIT compiles at runtime.

mnemonics.title: Error Types by Phase
mnemonics.content: Lexical errors (invalid chars) -> Syntax errors (grammar violations) -> Semantic errors (type mismatches) -> Logical errors (runtime). Errors escalate in complexity through phases.
